title: List View Widget - how to ensure to  maintain  the original board order of items

posts.author: skhan31 (Selina)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

In the List View Widget, we’re experiencing an issue where the order of the items in the widget does not match the order in which the items appear on the board. We’ve tried using sorting and filters, but the items in the List View Widget still display in alphabetical order.

I created a ticket with Monday.com, and they’ve acknowledged this as a “bug.” They’ve requested that I submit a feature request. In the meantime, I’m wondering if anyone in this community has found a workaround to ensure that the items appear in the same order in the List View Widget as they do on the board itself?

What are you trying to achieve

That that the items in the List View Widget appear in the same order as they do on the board itself.
